name: the-warning
prompt: Medium shot. Woman in navy uniform very close to dark-haired man, speaking intently. Her hand near his collar. Intimate distance. Cool room lighting, tension visible in composition. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: his-defense
prompt: Close-up. Dark-haired man's face, jaw tight, eyes hard. Defending against her words. Cool blue light from left, heavy shadows. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: the-pull
prompt: Medium close-up. Dark-haired man's face, composure cracking. Exhaustion visible in eyes, shoulders dropping slightly. Heavy shadows around him, muted tones. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

sfx.description: heavy emotional weight, muffled heartbeat slowing
